currentFocus: Projection/storage/consult integration: docs-only primitive projection contract and test-only launch-preset guard hardening are integrated with public-safe non-claims.

integratedWave.summary: Accepted tracked changes are limited to the PatchBench primitive projection roadmap contract, ROADMAP-INDEX routing metadata, and static WinUiProductLaneTests launch-preset guard hardening.
acceptedOutputs: Projection design accepted as docs-only primitive presentation contract.
Launch-preset routing/literal reintroduction hardening accepted as test-only static coverage.
rejectedOutputs: Late duplicate projection recovery output rejected as duplicate evidence.
Launch-preset recovery lane superseded with no accepted output.

patchBenchProjection.allowedHelperInputs: Display-safe primitives and primitive records only: strings, booleans, counts, small enums, nullable primitive fields, and sanitized display lists.
binaryPatchesPageOwns: UI launch argument selection and launch orchestration
patchBenchProjection.nonClaims: No helper extraction, behavior movement, AppCore ownership movement, file I/O movement, launch planning movement, process-control movement, Host/Join enablement, online-readiness promotion, runtime proof, release work, or broad page split.

launchPresetHardening.summary: WinUiProductLaneTests now guards against reintroducing canonical launch-preset status literals into BinaryPatchesPage and against drifting expected launch-preset button-to-helper visual bindings.
launchPresetHardening.nonClaims: No launch argument construction, selected-state logic, safe-copy planning, process control, AppCore behavior, user-visible product behavior, Host/Join availability, online readiness, runtime proof, UIA proof, release readiness, or publication changed.

storageTaxonomy.futureReviewValues: Medium and low values are non-authorized logical review ceilings only; they are not reclaimable storage, unique physical-size estimates, or cleanup budgets.

consultCompliance.summary: The early consult-evidence smoke ran before terminal worker reports existed and is superseded by integration audit of terminal reports. Per integration audit, accepted non-trivial terminal reports for this wave include the required six-lane Codex/Cursor normal and adversarial consult matrix. This is not a blanket campaign-wide compliance claim beyond inspected accepted outputs.

currentTruth.hardPayloadBoundary: No game assets, copied executables, arbitrary saves/options, screenshots/frame dumps, raw CDB logs, raw proof bundles, full Ghidra databases/backups, secrets, .env files, build output, package output, local proof paths, raw manifests, thread IDs, or local campaign/worktree paths belong in tracked state or docs.
currentTruth.installedGameOriginalBea: read-only; no mutation performed or authorized

validation.expectation: Integration validation must include edited JSON parsing, git diff --check, stale local path/campaign marker scan over tracked goal/state/front-door docs, docs/repo/payload gates, WinUI build, focused launch-preset tests, patch-engine safety, and primary-lane disposition.
latestIntegration: JSON parse for edited state files: PASS
stale local path/thread/campaign marker scan over tracked promotion files: PASS
npm run test:winui-patch-engine-safety: PASS after restoring required patch-catalog counters in state batons
validation.primaryLaneNote: npm run test:winui-primary-lane is not green: build passed and AppCore tests passed, then one native UIA smoke failed with FlaUI Mouse.SendInput Access denied; UiTests subtotal was 96 passed, 1 failed, 2 skipped. Treat as an environment validation exception for this static docs/test integration, not runtime proof.

currentCounters.catalogRows: 29/29 target specimen identity and policy metadata rows

nextSteps: Add primitive-state/helper-boundary tests that reject AppCore receipt DTOs, raw paths, File/Directory/Path, service/process/launch/catalog tokens, proof IDs, and Host/Join action strings before any receipt display helper extraction.
Keep source-summary extraction deferred until path/redaction projection is explicitly tested.
Keep storage work read-only until future deletion authority and candidate-specific evidence exist.
Keep runtime music proof at private pre-arm readiness only unless a future task grants explicit runtime-proof authority and leases.
